Tests the deletion of a property from an object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code defines an object `a` with two properties: `n` and `s`, which are associated with the `Number` and `String` constructors, respectively. The code then uses the `delete` operator to remove the `n` property from the object `a` and asserts that the operation returns `true`, indicating successful deletion. This script demonstrates the use of the `delete` operator to remove properties from an object and verifies the operation with an assertion. The functionality is narrow, focusing on object property manipulation and validation.
